tasks.title: Accept X-BSNexus-* headers in pre_call_hook
tasks.description: In bsgateway/routing/hook.py, modify async_pre_call_hook to extract optional headers: X-BSNexus-Task-Type (str), X-BSNexus-Priority (str: low/medium/high/critical), X-BSNexus-Complexity-Hint (int 0-100). Store in a NexusMetadata dataclass. Pass to RoutingDecision. Add the NexusMetadata dataclass to bsgateway/routing/models.py. Write tests first.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: NexusMetadata dataclass exists in models.py. pre_call_hook extracts headers when present, ignores when absent. RoutingDecision has optional nexus_metadata field. Tests verify extraction and missing-header behavior.

tasks.title: Enhance routing with task priority and complexity hint
tasks.description: In the auto-route path of hook.py _route(), when NexusMetadata is present: (1) If priority='critical', skip classification and route to highest tier. (2) If complexity_hint is provided, blend with classifier score using weighted average (70% classifier, 30% hint). (3) Log the decision source. Write tests first.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Critical priority bypasses classification. Complexity hint blends with classifier score. Decision source is logged. All existing routing tests still pass. New tests cover priority override and blending.

tasks.title: Add BSNexus metadata columns to routing_logs
tasks.description: Add columns to bsgateway/routing/sql/schema.sql: nexus_task_type TEXT, nexus_priority TEXT, nexus_complexity_hint INTEGER, decision_source TEXT (values: 'classifier', 'hint', 'blend', 'priority_override'). Update insert queries in queries.sql. Update collector.py record() to save these fields. Write a migration script if needed. Write tests first.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Schema has new columns. Insert queries accept new params. Collector saves NexusMetadata fields. Tests verify collector records metadata correctly.

tasks.title: End-to-end tests for metadata routing
tasks.description: Write integration tests in bsgateway/tests/ that verify the full flow: request with X-BSNexus-* headers → hook extracts → routing decision influenced → collector logs. Test all scenarios: no headers (backward compat), only priority, only hint, both, critical override.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Integration tests cover all header combinations. All tests pass. Coverage >= 80%.

tasks.title: Code review — fix all issues including minor ones
tasks.description: Review all changes. Check: backward compatibility (no headers = same behavior as before), test coverage >= 80%, ruff check passes, no security issues, schema.sql is valid, queries.sql params match.
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: ruff check bsgateway/ passes. pytest with coverage >= 80% passes. All existing tests unbroken.
